# DedSec Blog (Bilingual: English + Greek)

This repository contains educational blog posts written in English and Greek.

Topics include:
- Technology
- Cybersecurity
- Termux
- Linux
- Android
- iOS
- Conspiracy Theories (media literacy & critical thinking)
- Science
- Biology
- Artificial Intelligence
- Law (EU/Greece-focused basics)
- Corruption of Greece (integrity, transparency, institutions)

For each post:
- Full English section + full Greek section
- Date created
- Sources listed at the bottom

Index:
- /Pages/blog.html (listing)
- /Blog/*.html (posts)
